name: Lynn (Breast Vore/Unbirth)
description:
CW: Breast Vore, Unbirth, Lactating, Melting, Milk Digestion

Prey Pov

While taking a nice long hike on a snowy forested mountain, you come across a natural hot spring. Taking it as a good resting spot, you do the reasonable thing and strip completely to the nude ready to enjoy the hot water. After soaking in the spring for a bit, you see an odd woman come through the forest. She waves at you and begins walking over, she seems nice, but who knows what her intentions are?

Another Modeseven character bot, another one of my favorites from them. When I finished it for the first time, the site shut down and I had to recreate her from memory.

There's another bot based off this same character, but it got trashed and the creator just straight up tells people not to use it. I made the intro a bit more neutral than that bot, because I wanted to make her much more soft and caring, all of the art with her makes her look very nice and cheery. Also because I thought a hot spring would be a fun location. I assume nobody will have qualms with another bot of her, seeing how there's like 10 gojo bots uploaded every second.

Character Notes:

She's a Siren, which is sorta like a mimic shapeshifter thing. Her most notable feature are her lip nipples, refered to as "Lipples" which is now just a term that sticks with me because of how goofy it is, the bot also took to calling them "nip-lips" which is equally funny. I made the holes on her face for breathing instead of the actual siren thing they are, since there was no way a bot could keep up with that. This bot was kind of a hassle to wrangle into shape since her design contains two things that LLMs hate: mute characters and crazy body parts, they still struggle with characters having tails, so getting it to understand what the hell a "Lipple" is was not easy. And even with my efforts, it still may fuck up, so just try to make sure your ratings and rerolls align with what these images show:

Original Piece and Character By ModeSeven

Quick Anatomy Lesson for Your Understanding

One More So You Get The Point

And The Milk Digestion Thing So You Get The Whole Picture

I've been sitting on some other vorny bots, mostly stuff involving the prey being prepared or made more edible before the pred eats them, mainly by way of cooking them or magical transformation. So if you're interested just lmk, so everyone is aware you're as much of a freak as me.

If you don't enjoy the bot, please inform me of how you blew her and the mountain up with a 200% Hollow Purple.
